About Me

I am
Shrabanti Saha

I'm a full-stack developer passionate about building responsive web applications that provide seamless user experiences. I believe great software should be both functional and beautiful, accessible to everyone.

Currently exploring Machine Learning to create smarter solutions that can predict, adapt, and enhance user interactions. I'm constantly upgrading my skills to stay at the forefront of technology and build more impactful applications.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me experimenting with new ML algorithms, contributing to open source projects, or learning about emerging technologies that can solve real-world problems.
